qa_pairs.question: What information does the Slurm portal figure initially display when a user first logs in?
qa_pairs.answer: When a user first logs in to the Slurm portal, the figure will initially display CPU days on an arbitrary cluster across all project accounts that the user has access to.

qa_pairs.question: What message appears in the Slurm portal figure if there is no usage data for a specific cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: If there is no usage on a specific cluster, the Slurm portal figure will contain the text "No Data or usage too small to have a meaningful plot".

qa_pairs.question: How can a user modify the data shown in the Slurm portal figure?
qa_pairs.answer: The data displayed in the Slurm portal figure can be modified using three control panels located along the left margin of the page: 'Select system and dates', 'Parameters', and 'SLURM account'.
